name: Blackwing - Aurora the Northern Lights
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のアウロラ
name_jp_tl: Black Feather - Aurora the Northern Lights
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 2 face-up monsters you control (1 "Blackwing" Tuner and 1 non-Tuner), and cannot be Special Summoned by other ways. Once per turn: You can banish 1 "Blackwing" Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck; until the End Phase, this card's name and original ATK become that monster's, and replace this effect with that monster's original effects.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 2 face-up monsters you control (1 "Blackwing" Tuner and 1 non-Tuner), and cannot be Special Summoned by other ways. Once per turn: You can banish 1 "Blackwing" Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck; until the End Phase, this card's name and original ATK become that monster's, and replace this effect with that monster's original effects.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 2 face-up monsters you control (1 "Blackwing" Tuner and 1 non-Tuner), and cannot be Special Summoned by other ways. Once per turn: You can banish 1 "Blackwing" Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck; until the End Phase, this card's name and original ATK become that monster's, and replace this effect with that monster's original effects.

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes from Extra Deck for cost
